category_sources: source_facts.description says tf-profile is a CLI tool to profile Terraform runs.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository for tf-profile.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official datarootsio/tf-profile repository, matching the display name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for tf-profile.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists the tf-profile CLI executable.
